title: ErelisTextures
description: Vanilla themed recourcepack for PvP and Survival
body:
EST is a minecraft recourcepack created by me - im still working on it so updates will be added with the time going
The goal of this Texturepack is to create textures which fit for PvP and Survival
NOTE: I added a few easter eggs in this recourcepack (only two in current version)
Older versions are available [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/eagles-textures/files/all) (I don´t recommend them)

Spoiler

In the Gallery you can see a sprite including two 3D Item models one of them is the "BanHammer", in this case an iron axe (netherite axe in newer versions of the pack) will get this design by renaming it to "BanHammer" this won´t work with any other item and there are/will be a few more of these easter eggs.

PvP

Content only available in PvP versions of the pack and EST-0.3

In terms of the gamemode "Bedwars" I added a player model/skin laying in bed
which is located at: EST\assets\minecraft\textures\blocks\glbed_layer.png
you can replace the glbed_layer.png with any other minecraft skin.png just make sure it´s renamed correctly

Features

Should work in Minecraft version 1.6 - 1.21.3 - New armors - New swords and tools - New leave texture - New wool texture - Clear glass texture - Connected glass textures - Custom 3D models when renaming specific items - Low fire texture - Transparent pumpkinblur - Support for [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) (EST-0.4 and higher) - Custom block-breaking texture

other

NOTE: 3D models will only be visible for players using Optifine or CIT Reforged + Fusion for forge
or CIT Resewn + Continuity for fabric

Terms of use

EST
(short for ErelisTextures)

Resource Pack for Minecraft

TERMS OF USE

By continuing to use this resource pack, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions

- Erelis is the creator and copyright owner of this resource pack - These Terms of Use are subject to change at any time, and you will endeavour to refamiliarise yourself with them before any subsequent downloads. - The terms listed on the official project CurseForge or Modrinth pages, supersede any license, readme or terms of use information provided anywhere else, including in the resource pack files

- EST is a resourcepack containing many different files; mainly textures in PNG format and 3D models in JSON format. - EST has been tested as much as possible, but it may contain bugs. If you find one, you can report it at my courseforge. - EST has been scanned for viruses and malware and does not contain any (resourcepacks do not contain any executable files). - EST is downloadable only if you use the official link: https://modrinth.com/project/erelistextures/versions or https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/eagles-textures/files/all - In the unlikely event the pack causes damage to your device(s) the creator takes no responsibility for any damage rendered.

As a user of EST, you know that you ARE authorised to:

- decompile, alter and remix EST for personal use. This means you will not share the altered pack publicly. - decompile, alter and remix EST for exclusive use in online videos if, and only if, you add due credits in video description with a working link to my modrinth:" https://modrinth.com/project/erelistextures : EST ResourcePack by Erelis." - monetise online videos using EST if, and only if, you add due credits in video description with a working link to my modrinth:" https://modrinth.com/project/erelistextures/versions : EST ResourcePack by Erelis."
For any other reason than those previously stated you agree you ARE NOT authorised to:

- change the pack icon pack.png - modify, copy, host, mirror, publish, transfer, license, distribute, transmit, sell, monetise, reproduce, remix, alter or decompile EST. - create a remixpack using one or more files from EST and redistribute it, unless you have permission from the creator. - port this resource pack or its assets to work on Minecraft Bedrock Edition or any older/newer version of Minecraft Java Edition, unless you have permission from the creator.
If you do not agree with one or more of above terms, do not use EST.
